title: Tris-HCl Buffer
author: Neilier Junior

steps_raw.instruction: pH range: pH 7.2 to pH 9.0 (a) 0.1 M Tris(hydroxymethyl)aminomethane; 12.1 g L -1 (M.W.: 121.0 g mol -1 ) (b) 0.1 M Hydrochloric acid Mix 50 mL, Tris(hydroxymethyl)aminomethane and indicated volume of hydrochloric acid. %s %s
Adjust the final volume to 200 mL with deionized water.
Adjust the final pH using a sensitive pH meter.
